description:
Bifolio from a court ledger in the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan (compare Yevr.-Arab. I 1700). Dated: Tishrei-Ḥeshvan 1472 Seleucid = 1160 CE. 

Fol. 1r: trousseau list and dowry payments of a wedding involving the groom Barakāt b. Ghālib, mentioning items including sofas, different kind of cloth, chests and vessels, and a quarter dār. 

(Information mainly from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
